title: Oxylobium trilobum
taxonomy: Oxylobium trilobum is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. It belongs to the genus Oxylobium, which is a group of plants native to Australia. The Fabaceae family, also known as legumes, is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Within the Fabaceae family, Oxylobium trilobum is further classified into the subfamily Faboideae. The specific classification of Oxylobium trilobum provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
